description: Use this API to set the type of results displayed in the active Slider diagram to the differences in values between the current network case and a supplied comparison case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. setdiagrestypegdif(namearg, sfile)

parameters.name: namearg
parameters.description: Flag indicating how to match up buses in the two cases. (input).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of an existing saved case to compare the current case against. (input).
